content.en:
Ye Tian has a map of the Traceless Territory, plus his own strength is not weak, and he also has some half-step Eternal Realm to go to the Rift Valley, so the pressure he shares is not very large.

Soon, he broke out of the encirclement of the space-time dragon python and came to the Valley of the Rifting Winds.

As soon as I entered the Rift Valley, a gust of wind blew in.

Those space-time dragon pythons didn't dare to approach the Rift Valley one by one, and they retreated one after another, or lingered outside the Rift Valley, but they just didn't go in.

And Ye Tian also felt the strangeness of Rift Valley.

Rumble!!!!!

A breeze hit and blew on Ye Tian's will, as if his will had endured endless beatings, and this feeling was very painful.

Moreover, the longer the breeze blows, the stronger the impact of the will.

This is still on the periphery of the Rift Valley, and if it is in the inner perimeter, I am afraid that the impact will be even more severe.

Inside the Rift Valley, bear the impact of will, and outside the Rift Valley, endure the siege of the Time and Space Dragon Python.

Therefore, no one dares to stay here for a long time, otherwise the will will be severely damaged, and the strength will be greatly reduced, and it will even be difficult to resist the attack of the space-time dragon python.

Ye Tian walked step by step to the depths of the Rift Valley, feeling the impact of the will brought by the breeze, and actually enjoyed it silently.

"Compared to other Supreme Beings and Half-Step Eternal Realms, I rarely encounter major setbacks, although my willpower is not weak, but compared to those Half-Step Eternal Realms, it is still a little worse, maybe Rift Wind Valley can make up for the shortcomings in my will!" Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, he came to a more suitable position, sat cross-legged, and silently suffered the impact of his will.

At the same time, he made the duplicate body also start to copy the existence of a body as a doppelganger.

Wow!

Another Ye Tian appeared.

Ye Tian asked another Ye Tian to go to Traceless Mountain, and he didn't want to waste the opportunity of Traceless Mountain, so one copy body tempered his will in Rift Valley, and the other clone went to find the opportunity, and it didn't delay things at all.

Wow!

The clone acted, rushed out of the Rift Valley, and immediately entered the encirclement of the space-time dragon python.

Although Ye Tian's strength is not very strong, in terms of life-saving ability, he is even more powerful than the True River Sword Ancestor and them.

After becoming the Ninefold Supreme One, his life-preserving ability was almost comparable to that of the Star Ancestor, perhaps stronger, and there were too few existences in the Half-Step Eternal Realm that could kill him.

At the beginning, Xingzu was sealed by a half-step Eternal Realm, and that half-step Eternal Realm was also a top-notch half-step Eternal Realm not far from the Extreme Realm, no matter how the other party killed, he couldn't kill Xingzu, so he could only seal it.

Therefore, even if the ten Extreme Realms wanted to besiege Ye Tian, it would be difficult to kill him.

Unless a Seven-Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse like the Infinite Ice Ancestor attacked him, there would be no hope of killing him, and it would take a lot of time.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not afraid of being surrounded and killed by the space-time dragon python at all.

After some fighting, Ye Tian finally arrived at Traceless Mountain.

Mt. Traceless is a very large mountain, but it is actually a mountain range, and there are many treasures and buildings here.

Without the slightest hesitation, Ye Tian rushed directly to one of the peaks.

The Twelve Ancestors had revealed a piece of information, that is, there was a place on the Traceless Mountain that was very suitable for the Ninefold Supreme Being, where they could quickly improve their cultivation.

This is the Donghui Mountain of the Traceless Mountain, and on the Donghui Mountain, there is a special formation that can combine the power of this space-time territory to transform various energies into a special energy.

This energy is called the Traceless Liquid, and the Traceless Liquid cannot be stored in the outside world for a long time, so it cannot be taken away, and must be refined in time.

And the Traceless Liquid is estimated to be a special energy that has been researched by the Traceless Territory, which is extremely easy to absorb and refine, surpassing any kind of energy in the Source Sea, and even being much more valuable than many precious treasures that have improved cultivation.

If it is to refine the Traceless Liquid, it can improve the cultivation level in a short period of time, but it will not be of much help to the half-step Eternal Realm.

But for the Ninefold Supreme, the help is too great.

Therefore, Ye Tian will come to the east and return to the mountain.

After entering Donghui Mountain, Ye Tiancai found that he was the only one here, and the other half-step Eternal Realm did not come here.

Soon, Ye Tian came to a dilapidated hall, which was the East Hui Hall.

Although the main hall is dilapidated, the formation can still be used.

Ye Tian urged the formation here, and immediately took out countless resource materials.

This formation can't produce a traceless liquid out of thin air, and Ye Tian must provide resources himself.

When countless resources poured into the core of the Great Array, the Great Array began to transform energy.

As time slowly passed, a cyan droplet began to appear in the void, and this cyan droplet was the liquid without a trace.

Ye Tian swallowed the traceless liquid in one gulp and began to refine it.

Bang!!!!

The energy burst of the traceless liquid quickly integrated into Ye Tian's body, helping Ye Tian refine his body and improve his cultivation.

"It's such a powerful effect, but it's a pity that I'm not the body, and copying the body to improve the cultivation can't give back to the body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He knew that copying his body to improve his cultivation would not be of much help, but he still came here, mainly because his current strength was too weak, and he had to improve his cultivation in order to get good things in Traceless Mountain.

Of course, his body could also come here, but Ye Tian was unwilling to take risks.

After all, the fate of the Traceless Territory had not yet reached the point where he was desperate, and besides, if he wanted to ascend to the Ninefold Supreme Extreme, it would just take him some more time.

So, he didn't really care.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation has improved a lot, and his body has become much stronger, although he is still some distance away from the extreme of the Nine Folds Supreme, but his conventional combat power is probably comparable to the Jinchen Yuan Ancestor among the Twelve Ancestors.

"Almost, it's time to go to another part of Mt. Traceless. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

His body disappeared into the East Hui Mountain, and soon he arrived at the Traceless Tower of the Traceless Mountain.

The Traceless Tower is a tower of assessment once built by the Lord of Traceless for disciples or servants, the tower is divided into nine floors, and each floor you break through, you can get a corresponding reward.

Now, although the Traceless Lord has fallen, the Traceless Tower is still there, and there are still some rewards inside.

At this time.

Outside the Traceless Tower, the space-time dragon pythons shuttled back and forth.

After Ye Tian came here, he forcibly rushed into the Traceless Tower and came to the hall of the Traceless Tower.

Here he saw several acquaintances.

"True River Sword Ancestor, Wind Ancient Source Ancestor, you are also here!"

Ye Tian greeted.

"Endless Ancestor, you're here too!"

The True River Sword Ancestor and the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor said with a smile.
